scripts.docker:build:tag: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t althe3rd/tubegrab:latest -t althe3rd/tubegrab:$npm_config_tag --push .
scripts.docker:setup-builder: docker buildx inspect tubegrab-builder > /dev/null 2>&1 || docker buildx create --name tubegrab-builder --use && docker buildx use tubegrab-builder
